field_derivations.derivation_reason: The entity identifier is part of the general information required for the report.
field_derivations.review_note: Direct field derived from general report information.

field_derivations.derivation_reason: The entity name is part of the general information required for the report.
field_derivations.review_note: Direct field derived from general report information.

field_derivations.derivation_reason: The type of financial entity is part of general report information and determines reporting context.
field_derivations.review_note: Direct field derived from general report information.

field_derivations.derivation_reason: The reporting template distinguishes submission/report type.
field_derivations.review_note: Direct field derived from template/general information.

field_derivations.derivation_reason: The incident reference identifies the reported incident in the initial notification.
field_derivations.review_note: Direct field with commitment disclosure downstream.

field_derivations.derivation_reason: Detection time supports the outer reporting time limit and incident chronology.
field_derivations.review_note: UTC normalisation will be captured as an interpretation decision.

field_derivations.derivation_reason: Classification time supports the four-hour initial-notification clock and the major-incident classification workflow.
field_derivations.review_note: UTC normalisation and supporting evidence will be captured later.

field_derivations.derivation_reason: The field records the classification criteria on which the major-incident classification relies.
field_derivations.review_note: Disclosure and evidence implications require interpretation decisions.

field_derivations.derivation_reason: Affected Member States are report content for the initial notification.
field_derivations.review_note: Direct field.

field_derivations.derivation_reason: How the incident was discovered is report content for the initial notification.
field_derivations.review_note: Direct field.

field_derivations.derivation_reason: Business-continuity-plan activation is included in the initial-notification content model.
field_derivations.review_note: Direct field; disclosure classification may require privacy/security review.

field_derivations.derivation_reason: Initial impact description expresses report content about the incident impact.
field_derivations.review_note: Disclosure as commitment will be handled in interpretation/disclosure step.

field_derivations.derivation_reason: Primary contact details are report contact information.
field_derivations.review_note: Personal/business contact details require private disclosure downstream.

field_derivations.derivation_reason: Primary contact email is report contact information.
field_derivations.review_note: Personal/business contact details require private disclosure downstream.

field_derivations.derivation_reason: The competent authority is the recipient of the notification and is included so the directed act is explicit.
field_derivations.review_note: Operational support field, not a pure template-content field.

field_derivations.derivation_reason: Secondary contact information is optional support for report contact details.
field_derivations.review_note: Optional field; private disclosure downstream.

field_derivations.derivation_reason: Secondary contact email is optional support for report contact details.
field_derivations.review_note: Optional field; private disclosure downstream.

field_derivations.derivation_reason: First disruption time may be known at initial-notification stage but is associated with more detailed or later reporting.
field_derivations.review_note: Optional early information, not required initial-notification content.

field_derivations.derivation_reason: Affected functions/services may be known early and are relevant to incident impact, but are treated as optional in this profile.
field_derivations.review_note: Optional early information.

field_derivations.derivation_reason: Preliminary affected-client estimate may be known early but is treated as optional in this profile.
field_derivations.review_note: Optional early information.

field_derivations.derivation_reason: Preliminary financial amount may be known early and needs separate currency handling.
field_derivations.review_note: Optional early information; currency separation handled by reporting_currency.

field_derivations.derivation_reason: Reporting currency is modelled separately from amount fields to avoid hard-coded assumptions.
field_derivations.review_note: Direct/supporting field, also a modelling correction.

field_derivations.derivation_reason: Third-party involvement can matter to the DORA reporting context and reporting-on-behalf arrangements.
field_derivations.review_note: Optional, interpretive, and disclosure-sensitive.

field_derivations.derivation_reason: Outsourcing reference supports third-party reporting context where relevant.
field_derivations.review_note: Optional operational-support field, not required initial-notification content.

field_derivations.derivation_reason: Optional cross-reference to a related threat notification when such record exists.
field_derivations.review_note: Cross-regime link only; not DORA-required content.

field_derivations.derivation_reason: Optional cross-reference to a related NIS2 notification when such record exists.
field_derivations.review_note: Cross-regime link only; DORA notification does not replace NIS2 obligations.

field_derivations.derivation_reason: Optional cross-reference to a related GDPR breach notification when such record exists.
field_derivations.review_note: Cross-regime link only; DORA notification does not replace GDPR obligations.

non_claims: These derivations map profile fields to legal actions and source fragments; they do not prove legal correctness.
Operational support fields are explicit and reviewable, not hidden additions.
title: Human-authored DORA field derivations for initial notification
